'''Sorrusians''' were a [[Near-Human]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sorrus]]. They differed from baseline [[Human/Legends|Humans]] in that their [[Skeleton/Legends|skeletal]] system could compress, allowing them to squeeze through tight places.

Notable Sorrusians included the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Ona Nobis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Deadly Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment]]''
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dangerous Rescue]]''
*''[[Rebel Force: Firefight]]''
